reason: Verified that the agent can successfully use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Step 1: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with sidebar showing agents
Step 2: Found and clicked agent "QA-20260331-163006-9bzj" in sidebar - Agent page opened successfully
Step 3: Verified agent status is "idle" - Status shown as "idle" in header, which satisfies "running or idle" requirement
Step 4: Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Step 5a: GitHub account access request card appeared - Card displayed with option to select GitHub account
Step 5b: Selected GitHub account checkbox - Checkbox marked as checked
Step 5c: Clicked "Grant Access" button - Access granted, agent resumed working
Step 5d: API Request Review card appeared for GET /user - Card displayed with Allow/Deny/Remember options
Step 5e: Clicked "Allow" button to permit API request - Request allowed, agent continued processing
Step 6: Waited for response - Agent completed in 43 seconds
Step 7: Verified response includes GitHub username "yiw190" and took screenshot - Response clearly shows "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
